author: Catherine Mitchell
text: We would recommend arranging trips with Khao Lak land discovery. We went to the Similan islands, on the Jungle Expedition and to Little Amazon with them. Lars was really helpful, making it easy to decide which trips would help us to make the most of our visit. The Guides were all wonderful - friendly, well informed and helpful. If we had longer here we would have done more.

author: Paul Watson
text: Went on two trips with this operator, through our hotel, but had the same tour guide on both days, a guy called Nick (I think, he's in the photos). He was wonderful, so attentive, full of stories, and brilliant fun.

author: Ben Saler
text: Wow!!! Amazing!!!! We did white water rafting, atv quad biking, ziplining, waterfall visit on first day and monkey parks, james bond island, longtail boat through mangroves, gypsea sea village lunch, canoeing over 2nd day, during quiet season (august). Absolutely loved our experience and cant recommend these excursions enough!!!! The 2x English speaking tour guides were both very experienced, loved their job, very knowledgable, good communicators. Well done Sum Chiy. They pack so many interesting things in to each day trip and it is very well thought out / organised, you are picked up and dropped off at your resort, great meals and nice cold waters provided. Come ready for a big wild adventure, make friends with the people in your van and you will enjoy the day even more. Recommend to go in quiet season like we did, some day options are not available but its better that its not been crowded or too busy. We recommend this to anybody feeling adventurous!

author: Melissa Dor
text: What a fantastic tour we did to Khao Sok National Park. Our guide, Oil, was amazing. So incredibly knowledgeable about the area, the flora and fauna and the geography. Nothing was too much trouble for her. We visited the cave and travelled the lake by longboat, did a jungle hike and had lunch at the rafthouse. Then a swim and kayak. The mini bus was comfortable and our driver was great. Highly recomnend this tour.

author: Viviane Bronkhorst
text:
Great service. Value for your momey. Office employees speaks very well english. We booked a early morning tour to phang nga. Because of low season it was not busy. We were with 6 people on the boats in total. Guide spoke English and German very well. The tour was amazing. Beautiful caves and islands. We stopped extra at james bond Island. We supposed just to pass it and watch from the boat. But because it was so quiet and we had the time the guide to us on to the island as an extra.
Longtailboat
Panak island walk and canoe (ice cream caves)
Hong Island canoe
James bond Island
Payee village (for lunch)
Temple wat Susan khuha
Monkey cave
transfer from and to khao lak

6 years ago I went to khao sok with the same organisation.

author: Dipak Gorasia
text:
We booked a trip to Surin island, although the hotel pickup for starting  the tour was really early compared to others it meant we were one of the first to snorkel and visit the islands so there weren't many people there, just those from our tour group.

The guides were also excellent ensuring we had a great time during the tour.

author: Sarah Dolphin
text:
We booked 3 tours with KLLD. The safari tour was definitely our favourite. My biggest concern when booking a tour with elephants was that it wouldn’t be ethical and they would be poorly treated, but the sanctuary was beautiful and family run and the elephants were so well looked after. Our tour guide Gift was so lovely and had so many stories to share about Khoa Lak it really made a massive difference.

Our second tour was the adventure tour. It was such a fun day out, the guides on the water rafts, quad bikes and zip lines were all fantastic. As well as our guide for the overall trip, Ann. Ann went above and beyond, she took so many photos of us to send at the end of the day which was great as I wasn’t keen to get my phone out myself due to the activities.

On both of the above tours there was an unreal lunch included. KLLD have really chosen the best companies to work with, every person we met during our tours was so kind, welcoming and really made the whole experience that much better.

Lastly we did the Patong Beach tour. This included a lift down to Patong Beach at 2pm and a lift home at 11pm. We really enjoyed this trip as Khoa Lak is very quiet so we got to see another part of Thailand that was the complete opposite.

author: Lois Hillier
text: Nares was an amazing tour guide, along with his team made the day very special. The adventures were incredible, like nothing we had experienced before! Thank you for a real memorable day! We had a lot of fun!

author: Lavinia Dragan
text: We were a group of 14 people and spent and amazing day with Oil and the team. We booked the James Bond tour and Oil was the perfect tour guide! So friendly and helpful! It was a pleasure spending the day with her!

author: J ski
text: Went on a tour with them. The guide Jake was amazing and so was the driver. The first half of the tour was really interesting and beautiful. I unfortunately missed the second half due to illness and the guide and driver arranged for me to get back to my resort safely without having to disturb anyone else.

author: Luke Davies
text: Highly recommend using KKLD. The experience was amazing, our guide Thomas was very knowledgeable and gave us an in depth run down about the elephant tour. The hotel transfer was punctual and comfortable

author: Chr Woel (woellersen)
text: Many thanks to Isi.The trip with you was perfect!so good informations about thailand/khao lak.we booked the khao lak safari..and the elephant park is so nice.i am sure, that they have a good life there.i can recommend this agency.

author: Bruce
text: We participated in the Khao lak full day safari on the 3rd of May. Our tour started with a very sweet girl called 'Gift' and her driver picking us up at the front of the hotel. She told us we would go visit the tsunami memorial first because it was an important part for the history of Khao lak. After that we went to a temple where we participated in a Buddhist ceremony. Next we went tot the bamboo rafting, we first enjoyed a self made coffee before heading onto the river. On the raft we were shown multiple things like a snake, a frog and a place where we could go for a swim. After the bamboo rafting we headed to the elephants, here we received a delicious meal while we could see the elephants passing by. After the meal it was our turn to bathe with the elephants. The elephant keeper took a lot of great pictures of us while we were washing the elephant. The elephant bathing was followed up by a visit to the turtle conservation centre where they raise turtles so they can release them in the sea again and preserve their existence. Last but not least we finished this tour with a relaxing visit to a waterfall. In short, this tour was a full day of great activities. We would like to thank the tour guide 'gift' one more time for this amazing day and we will certainly book more tours with Khao Lak land discovery in the future.

author: วิภาวี สวัสดิ์พูน
text: We booked Amazing 3 Temps trip this is amazing trip have a good view and good culture. It’s a nice trip.

author: Oliver OHP
text:
This company deserves 10 stars, they are very professional and we had a blast of a tour⭐️
We chose the 3 days 2 night tour, and every moment was fun🏕️

But one thing is for sure, this tour would be nothing without Aris, she was so professional and fun, she is the best guide we ever had on any tour, she is a pure honest person, and her love for animals are amazing🇹🇭

And the driver Boi, was just happy and easy going, don’t forget that these people are those who really carries the company ❤️

author: Ibi god
text: Khao Lak land discovery is amazing for any tours accomidation or motorbike needs. They helped me very much with places to visit and things to do in and around khao Lak. Very reasonably priced and amazing places to visit. Got picked up on time for James Bond tour of islands and floating village. Amazing time would highly recommended them for anyone visiting khao lak.

author: Larry Subramanian
text: We booked the adventure of 2 days/1 night in Khao Sok National Park tour and we were incredibly impressed. The tour had everything needed to make a trip to Thailand worth it: long tail boat rides, jungle exploring, bungalow living, and delicious food. I travel frequently internationally and Oil is one of the best tour guides I have ever had. She was very knowledgeable about the wildlife present in the park.  She expertly led us on a night safari and on a hike. Alex our driver had a smile on his face the entire time during the drive and during the tour itself. He was always on the spot if we needed assistance. Both Oil and Alex were very accommodating and catered to all our needs, including providing us delicious meals and making the trek to pick us up and drop us off all the way down in Phuket. There isn’t enough space to write how thankful we are for both of them. I highly highly recommend this tour and also recommend requesting for both Oil and Alex to join you.

author: Polina L
text:
Went to Similan with this agency. We were very disappointed with the vehicle as it only had benches on the sides of the boat, which was extremely inconvenient for the more than 1-hour-long trip. Additionally, there were not enough seats to accommodate all the people on board, and some individuals had to squeeze themselves into the edge seats between their neighbors' legs.

The Similan Islands themselves are magnificent, a kind of extraterrestrial piece of untouched nature with white sand and azure water. So I recommend visiting, but consider different agency.

author: Arne Hamann
text: We took part in the off-road safari on 26 Oct. It was great, varied and spectacular. Michael provided us with interesting information. When the canoe trip was supposed to be we had a heavy thunderstorm. The group agreed it could be dangerous on the water during the storm and asked Michael to cancel the tour. But the day was still full of good experiences and we like to thank Michael and his driver once more.

author: Hugh Campbell
text:
We chose their elephant experience over others as it was shorter, and focused on the time spent with the elephants. We have two small children and didn't want to stretch their patience with harvesting grass and preparing food, which some other elephant experiences in the area include.

We were not disappointed - everything was exactly as described. The drive the and back from The Sands in Khao Lak was about an hour. The driver and guide were both fantastic. The elephants appeared happy and in good health, and seemed to enjoy the experience as much as we did! The setting in the jungle was picturesque.

I definately recommend.

author: Jackson Marshall
text: All five stars go to Gift, the best temple tour guide and our favourite among a great team of hosts at Khao Lak Land Discovery! If you're wanting to learn more about traditional Thai faith and have any and every question answered, you owe it to yourself and your holiday crew to book with Gift! Thank you!

author: Elise van Haaren
text:
Review: Unforgettable Wildlife Tour with Guide Oil!

We recently had an amazing 2-day wildlife tour with guide Oil, and it was truly unforgettable! Oil's passion for nature and wildlife was infectious, and her knowledge and enthusiasm made the experience incredible. She was always helpful and friendly, ensuring everyone had a great time. The tour was well-organized, and the accommodation and food were excellent. If you want an adventure filled with amazing animals and fantastic memories, book this tour with Oil as your guide!

author: Dominik Dommick
text: We booked a Phuket Day Trip. Should have been about an hour drive from Khao Lak. Nobody in the Bus (8 People) knew what happened next. The driver spoke no English, German, French. He just did not reply to questions. After 3,5 Hours in an badly climatized Bus with no water we reached the Big Buddha Site where nobody wanted to go. Again after telling him that we all wanted to go to Phuket he just shrug his shoulders. What a grotesque experience. Do NOT book them.

author: Erika Garn
text: The overnight Khao Sok tour was well worth it! Our tour guide Oil was the best and made sure everyone on tour was well taken care of and having a good time. She was so positive, knowledgable and passionate the entire time and would go above and beyond to make sure everyone was ok and happy. She spoiled me with her delicious iced coffees at the bungalow! Oil also explained our tour schedule frequently and made sure we were aware of what we were doing next. Our driver Alex was also amazing. Always smiling no matter what, very attentive and willing to help out. Between the two of them we could not have gotten a better experience throughout the long tail boat rides, safaris, hiking, and staying at the bungalows. We miss you Oil and Alex!!

author: Axelle Baillet
text: Great tour operator which took us 2 + our kid of 3 for a one day tour to the similan islands. Super well organized, taking us to great places with not too many tourists. We were afraid of the 70-minute speedboat with our small kid but in the end it was super easy. We saw tons of beautiful fishes, had a good lunch on a paradise beach. Francesco our italian guide was extremely nice and attentive to our kid. Hughes their french speaking contact person was very reactive and helped us a lot in organizing the trip in advance.

author: Andy Burch
text:
Absolutely brilliant trip! We did the overnight treehouse tour which included bathing elephants, rafting down the river, staying in a lovely treehouse cabin and exploring the Cheow Lan lake on Thai longboat.
There were so many highlights and our tour leader Ares added a lot to the experience with her knowledge, passion and humour.
I would thoroughly recommend this tour

author: Nicky Hill
text: Used this company for the Elephant experience and it was amazing. Very easy to book and very friendly team. Our guide was super informative but also good fun. The elephants are so well treated it was a pleasure to visit them

author: Tzvikir Rosenberg
text: We booked the khao sok lake day trip. It was excellent. Oil, our tour guide, was amazing. Good English and good knowledge about the area. Everything was included and still there was some room for spontaneous.

author: Aaron Kendrick
text: Organised transfer from Phuket Airport to Khao Lak for family of 9. Reliable, Safe, Clean vehicles. Great communication and booking procedure. Can't wait to return to Khao Lak and will use Khao Lak Land Discovery again!!

author: Martin Heine
text: Booked airport pick-up and drop-off service as well as tour. Pick-up and drop-off worked perfectly. Email and fax confirmation, driver waited outside, car in perfect condition and good as well as safe drive. The tour was well organized. Pick-up on time, car and driver as above. Guide (Rollo) was very nice, some extra stops, flexible arrangements to even more enjoy the day. Full recommendation!

author: Charlie Finbow
text: My wife and I just returned from the Khao Sok 2 day discovery tour with Isi and we couldn't have had a better time, from start to finish we had a smile on our faces, we had an 8 person group and everyone was great, all having a good laugh together which made our own experience that much better, Isi Is so full of information and can speak 3 languages, the lake itself was mind blowing, and we finished it off with a swim, well more of a bob, and a beer, the perfect trip, thank you khao lak discovery and everyone involved on our tour 🐘

author: Joe dC
text: Highly recommended. Person in the booking office (it's above McDonald's) spoke excellent English and recommended the early start Similan Island Snorkelling tour which avoided the main schedule of (literally 100s of additional tourists). We only joined the throng of people for lunch, every other part of the day was relaxing and amazing fish etc. Also saw a sea turtle. Oh yeah and I have never seen water look like this, amazing turquoise-blue.

author: Danielle Sedef
text: Absolutely fantastic tour! We did the khao lak safari today and honestly there isn’t a single thing we’d change it was absolutely brilliant, very well managed, organised and run! The tour guide, Hughi, was so knowledgable, charismatic and made it so much fun throughout the whole day. We still can’t believe how much they packed into the day you really do get value for your money! The lunch included was at a local unassuming restaurant but was absolutely delicious and way more than we were expecting! Can’t recommend this company enough it’s been one of the best days we’ve ever had!

author: Nic Tanner
text: Lars was so very helpful, trying to navigate transport south to Malaysia, he gave us the best options that no one else was able to do. Lars we are on the train heading south. If you are ever in khao Lak make sure you use these guys. Thank you

author: JPS
text:
This is a review of the Half Day Elephant Welfare Centre trip we booked through them, which is advertised in their brochure.

Firstly, but least importantly, it isn't a half day. After loads of travel and picks ups etc, it is around an hour and a half there.

More importantly, it is not a welfare centre. The elephants are ordered around a very small enclosure and respond to command. They look dead behind the eyes and are marched down to the steam to be washed by groups of tourists. They must have to do this multiple times a day. They are bread in captivity and you can make out their small cages in the distance. It's not good to see and I cannot understand how this contributes to their 'welfare'.

We were naive, but it has made me realise I should not have contributed towards this industry and will never pay for any kind of animal interaction again.

author: Kyle Darren Jatulan
text:
Similan Islands, invites everyone who loves to go for sea adventure. Though Similan Islands is now being visited by a lot of tourist annually, booking with the right tour agency can help you get the trick if you want to have an amazing adventure. I booked my trip with Khao Lak Land Discovery again, without any hesitation (first trip was Surin Islands). From the pros I've mentioned before, they still got it well maintained. From land transfer, private port, informative guides, private speed boats, and they won't even let you starve before and during your trip. Guides will even tell you when is the best time to take a "selfie" so that you will not be missing any beautiful shot.

If your planning to go for Similan/Surin Island trip, I highly recommend their team. I've seen and felt their compassion towards keeping the Islands clean and maintaining it. As well as how they support the locals in Surin which is a bad shape because of the accident that happened. So let's not just go for a trip that will benefit us but let's choose also an agency that helps and protect what they're promoting too. Let's practice responsible tourism.

author: Eint Chu

Unless you don't mind paying for it or particular about service they provide( usually all of the tours  around are almost the same type).. you can book via klook online for half the prices for some of the tours .
